feedback.text: As a citizen of the European Union, I am often frustrated by digital purchases of video games. The thesis are usually games that I have paid for. However, after a short time, these games are no longer considered profitable by the respective publisher and are no longer made available to me. A specific example of this is the game Resident Evil Re:Verse, which I received with my $60 purchase of the main game. This game was just shut down, so there is no longer way for me to access the content I paid for. Because of this and other examples, such as The Crew or LawBreakers, I want to demand that video game customers be protected from having their legally acquired products taken away.
